raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Dream Play Yard is designed to support the physical, emotional, and social well-being of local youth.",
    "The project was funded by $400,000 from the Fiscal Year 2022-23 state budget and local donors.",
    "The Dream Play Yard features amenities such as a new play structure, turf and shade areas, and skateboarding space.",
    "The design of the Dream Play Yard supports both unstructured play and organized programs.",
    "The Dream Play Yard offers mindfulness-based activities such as yoga, tai chi, meditation, and music therapy.",
    "Increased screen time is linked to rising levels of anxiety and depression among youth.",
    "The outdoor setting and art installations in the Dream Play Yard promote emotional expression and physical well-being."
  ]
}
```
